objectives: Evaluate test coverage and quality for mx20022 workspace
Assess unit tests, integration tests, and identify coverage gaps
Focus on: test organization, critical path coverage, edge cases, fixture quality, maintainability
important_facts: Total test count: 715 (all passing as of commit e8b15ec)

Per-crate unit test distribution: codegen=174, validate-inline=155, validate-schemes-external=45, validate-integration=15, roundtrip_all=39, translate-mt-parser=39, translate-translation=16, cli-integration=18, model-newtype=33, model-builder=7, codegen-snapshots=4, parse-roundtrip=9
Doc-tests contribute: codegen=7, model=7, parse=4, translate=7 (1 ignored), validate=31

CLI integration tests now cover: validate --scheme fednow/sepa/cbpr (3), validate invalid scheme (1), translate mt103->pacs008 (1), translate nonexistent file (1) — 7 new tests

schemes.rs now has 45 tests including 7 new negative tests: fednow_rejects_zero_amount, fednow_rejects_long_e2e_id, sepa_rejects_missing_debtor_name, sepa_rejects_missing_creditor_name, cbpr_rejects_missing_chrgbr, cbpr_rejects_invalid_chrgbr_value, cbpr_rejects_unclosed_parent_tag
common.rs (shared scheme helpers) has 13 inline tests covering parse_amount_cents and extract_parent_block
newtype_validation.rs has 33 tests covering ActiveCurrencyCode, CountryCode, BICFIDec2014Identifier, IBAN2007Identifier, Max35Text, UUIDv4Identifier with boundary conditions
Pattern codegen has 4 semantic compile-and-run tests: semantic_three_uppercase, semantic_date_with_dashes, semantic_iban_pattern, semantic_bic_with_optional_suffix
Snapshots now cover 3 schemas: head.001.001.04, pacs.008.001.13, camt.053.001.11
camt.053 and camt.054 roundtrip stubs STILL use empty stmt/ntfctn vecs — structural serialization of entries untested
testdata/translation/ still only has input.txt files — NO expected.xml output files for golden-file testing
File size guard (10MB) has ZERO test coverage in CLI integration tests
with_max_amount(0.0) / negative / NaN / infinity edge cases for FedNow validator have no test (only assert, no test that assert fires)
Translate CLI: only mt103->pacs008 smoke test; no mt202->pacs009 or mt940->camt053 CLI tests
No CLI tests for validate with SEPA/CBPR/FedNow invalid fixtures (only fednow_invalid_catches_error exists)
head.001.001.02, pacs.008.001.08, pacs.008.001.10 still have no roundtrip or fixture-parse tests
Typed validation path (validate_typed) has 10 tests for FedNow+SEPA+CBPR+ — cbpr_typed_missing_bic uses loose `.contains("_BIC")` assertion rather than specific rule ID
RuleRegistry inline tests: 83 inline tests across all rules/*.rs modules
decisions_made: pacs.008.001.13 roundtrip gap from prior audit is now fully resolved
CLI --scheme and translate smoke test gaps from prior audit are now resolved
Highest remaining risks: camt.053/054 empty-collection stubs, file-size-guard untested, translation golden-file absent
artifacts: crates/mx20022-parse/tests/roundtrip_all.rs (39 tests: 11 modules x roundtrip+envelope_detect, pacs.008 adds fixture_parses, 5 fixture-parse fns at bottom)
crates/mx20022-validate/tests/schemes.rs (45 tests including 10 typed-path tests + 7 new negatives)
risks_issues: camt.053 and camt.054 roundtrip use empty stmt/ntfctn: statement entries and notification entries serialization untested: OPEN
File size guard (10MB) in validate and translate CLI commands has no integration test: OPEN
testdata/translation/ has no expected output files: golden-file translation testing impossible: OPEN
head.001.001.02, pacs.008.001.08, pacs.008.001.10 have no parse or roundtrip test: low priority but non-zero regression risk: OPEN
with_max_amount assert fires on 0.0/negative/NaN but no #[should_panic] test documents expected behavior: OPEN
cbpr_typed_missing_bic uses `.contains("_BIC")` rather than exact rule ID: fragile assertion: LOW

iteration.summary: Performed full re-audit against commit e8b15ec (HEAD). The suite has grown from roughly 530 tests to 715 and all three major gaps from the prior audit have been closed: pacs.008.001.13 roundtrip identity test exists, CLI --scheme and translate smoke tests exist, and 7 new negative scheme tests were added. The primary remaining structural gap is camt.053/camt.054 roundtrip tests still use empty collections, so statement/entry/balance serialization is untested. The 10MB file size guard has no integration test coverage. Translation golden-file testing remains impossible due to missing expected output files in testdata/translation/. The test suite is well-organized with clear separation between unit, inline, and integration layers.
outputs_produced: Full structured test coverage assessment delivered in conversation
next_actions: Add camt.053 roundtrip with at least one AccountStatement14 entry (with balances and one Entry15 entry)
Add camt.054 roundtrip with at least one GroupHeader114 ntfctn entry
Add CLI integration test for validate over a file > 10MB (validate_oversized_file_exits_nonzero)
Add CLI integration test for translate over a file > 10MB
Add #[should_panic] test for FedNowValidator::with_max_amount(0.0) and with_max_amount(f64::NAN)
Add CLI integration test: validate --scheme sepa on sepa/invalid_usd.xml exits nonzero and contains SEPA_CURRENCY
Add CLI integration test: validate --scheme cbpr on cbpr/missing_bic.xml exits nonzero
Fix cbpr_typed_missing_bic to assert exact rule_id rather than .contains("_BIC")
